1.name: Wings of Freedom
1.description: Removes and grants a friendly target immunity to effects that cause loss of control for $DUR.

2.name: Blessing of Champions
2.description: Bless a friendly target with the might of a champion, increasing their Attributes by $E1min% for $DUR.

3.name: Blessing of Defense
3.description: Fortify a friendly target with your blessing, adding an additional $E1min% chance to parry for 5 min.

4.name: Charge
4.description: Rush towards an enemy and stun them for $DUR.

5.name: Cleanse
5.description: Cleanses a friendly target of one poison or disease effect.

6.name: Divine Strike
6.description: An instant strike that will deal $E1min% of your weapon damage as Holy damage and increase damage taken by the target by 1%. Can be stacked up to ten times. Lasts $DUR.

7.name: Fortification Aura
7.description: Reduces physical damage taken by friendly targets within 30 yards of the caster by $E1min%. Lasts 15 sec.

8.name: Divine Protection
8.description: Protects the Paladin from all damage and spells for $DUR. Reduces damage dealt by $E2min%.
8.aura_description: Immune to all damage and spells.

9.name: Holy Wrath
9.description: Calls down a bolt of divine energy from the sky, dealing $E1min-$E1max Holy damage and an additional $E2max Holy damage over 3 sec.

10.name: Radiance
10.description: Heals a friendly target for $E1min-$E1max and an additional $E2max over $DUR.

11.name: Hammer of Might
11.description: Hurls a magical hammer at an enemy, causing $E1min-$E1max Holy damage and stunning the target for $DUR.

12.name: Touch of Salvation
12.description: Heals a friendly target to full health.

13.name: Mighty Blow
13.description: An instant strike that causes $E1min% weapon damage and $E2min threat.

14.name: Retribution
14.description: A strike that becomes active after parrying or resisting an opponent's attack. This attack deals $E1min% weapon damage and pacifies the target, preventing it from using melee for $DUR.
14.aura_description: Pacified and silenced. Unable to use melee or magical attacks.

15.name: Redemption
15.description: Restore a dead target, resurrecting them with 40% health and 20% mana.

16.name: Vengeance Aura
16.description: Increases the damage of friendly targets within 30 yards of the caster by $E1min%. Lasts 15 sec.

17.name: Righteous Storm
17.description: Increases all damage done by $E1D3% for $DUR.

18.name: Salvation Aura
18.description: Reduces magical damage taken by friendly targets within 30 yards of the caster by $E1min%. Lasts 15 sec.

19.name: Shield Block
19.description: Raise your shield, increasing your Block Rating by $E1min for $DUR.

20.name: Aegis of Valor
20.description: Reduces all damage taken by $E1min% for 15 sec.

21.name: Magical Amplification
21.description: Increases magical damage done by a friendly target by $E1min%. Lasts 5 min.

22.name: Vim of Wisdom
22.description: Raises a friendly target's intellect by $E1min points for 5 min.

23.name: Boon of Clairvoyance
23.description: Increases your spell critical rating by $E1min. Lasts for $DUR.
23.aura_description: Increases chance to hit with spells.

24.name: Boon of Protection
24.description: Absorbs $E1min damage and grants immunity to Stun effects for $DUR.

25.name: Antimagic
25.description: Interrupts the enemy's spellcast, preventing that school of magic from being cast for $DUR.

26.name: Magical Dampening
26.description: Reduces magical damage taken by a friendly target by $E1min%. Lasts 5 min.

27.name: Ignite
27.description: Blasts an enemy target, dealing $E1min-$E1max Fire damage plus an additional $E2max damage over $DUR. The target takes $E1D3% increased fire damage.

28.name: Warmth
28.description: Increases your Fire damage dealt by $E1min% and reduces Fire damage taken by $E2min% for $DUR.
28.aura_description: Reduces fire damage taken and increases fire damage dealt.

29.name: Fireball
29.description: Hurls a fiery ball that causes $E1min-$E1max Fire damage.

30.name: Ice Blast
30.description: Blasts five enemies near the targeted area for $E1min to $E1max Frost damage and freezes them, preventing movement for $DUR.

31.name: Chains of Ice
31.description: Inflicts $E1min-$E1max Frost damage to an enemy target and reduces movement speed by $E2D3% for $DUR.

32.name: Ice Shard
32.description: Deals $E1min-$E1max Frost damage to an enemy target, stuns for $DUR and knocks the target back a short distance. Can only be used on targets affected by Chains of Ice.

33.name: Deep Freeze
33.description: Encases the selected target in a block of ice, making them immune to all spells and damage for $DUR but during that time they cannot attack, move, or cast spells.
33.aura_description: Frozen solid. Immune to all attacks and damage. Cannot attack, move, or use spells.

34.name: Illusion Gate
34.description: Summons a Return Obelisk through which players can return to the church of St. Revere. Lasts $DUR.

35.name: Inferno
35.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes $E1min-$E1max Fire damage.

36.name: Wisdom of Lazarus
36.description: Instantly restores $E2min% of your mana and then an additional $E1min mana every second for $DUR.

37.name: Bind Spirit
37.description: Banish an enemy target, preventing them from acting for for $DUR. The effect will disappear if the target is struck by damage. Duration is reduced against enemy players

38.name: Remove Curse
38.description: Removes one Curse effect from a friendly target.

39.name: Scorch
39.description: Inflicts $E1min-$E1max Fire damage to an enemy target.

40.name: Teleport
40.description: Instantly relocates the caster to the target area. Frees the caster from Stun and Root effects. Target must be reachable.

41.name: Aimed Shot
41.description: An aimed shot that deals $E1min% ranged damage. This attack cannot be dodged, blocked or parried and also ignores armor.

42.name: Arrow Flurry
42.description: Reduces the cooldown on Ranged Attack by $E1min% for $DUR.

43.name: Sinister Strike
43.description: A strong attack that deals $E1min% melee damage.

44.name: Blindside
44.description: Hurls a dagger at an enemy target, incapacitating for $DUR. Any damage will remove the effect.

45.name: Devotion
45.description: Damage dealt by physical attacks is increased by $E1min% for 5 sec. Restores 20% mana when it expires.

46.name: Entangling Shot
46.description: Attacks the legs of an enemy target, dealing $E1min% ranged damage and reducing the target's movement speed by 40% for $DUR.

47.name: Explosive Arrow
47.description:
You fire an explosive shot into the enemy target, dealing $E1min% ranged damage as Fire damage.

Target requires Flame Arrow.
Cannot dodged, block or parry.

48.name: Focused Evasion
48.description: Allows you to evade one hostile attack for $DUR.

49.name: Multi-Shot
49.description: Fires three arrows at an enemy target in rapid succession.

50.name: Sabotage
50.description: Incapacitates a target not in combat for $DUR. Any damage will revive the target. Sabotage will remove you from Stealth.

51.name: Sleep Arrow
51.description: Forces an enemy target to fall asleep for $DUR. Any damage caused will awaken the target.

52.name: Vanish
52.description: Allows the caster to sneak around, but reduces speed by $E3D2%. Dealing or receiving any hostile action will cancel this effect. Lasts $DUR.
52.aura_description: Stealthed. Any hostile action will cancel this effect.

53.name: Tactical Retreat
53.description: Retreat from an enemy. Breaks from stuns and movement impairing effects to leap backwards a short distance. Increases your movement speed by $E2min% for $DUR.

54.name: Stunning Shot
54.description: Fires an arrow at enemy target, dealing $E1min% ranged damage and pushing them back a short distance, stunning the target for 1 sec.

55.name: Ethereal Sting
55.description: Burns $E1min of an enemy's mana every $INVL for $DUR and reducing the healing it receives by 50%.
55.aura_description: Burns mana over time. Reduces healing done by half.

56.name: Hamstring
56.description: Maims an enemy target for $E1min% melee damage, reducing their movement speed by $E3min% for $DUR.

57.name: Flame Arrow
57.description: An instant shot that causes $E1min% ranged damage as Fire damage and increases fire damage taken by the victim by $E2min% for $DUR.
57.aura_description: Increases the amount of fire damage taken.

58.name: Kidney Shot
58.description: A powerful ranged attack that requires careful aim. Deals 200% ranged weapon damage and stuns the target for 2 sec. Can only be used on Incapacitated targets.

59.name: Eye Gouge
59.description: Blinds an enemy target, decreasing all combat skills by $E1min% for $DUR.

60.name: Mark Target
60.description: Marks an enemy target, increasing all damage taken by 10% for $DUR.

61.name: Blessing of Health
61.description: Increases a friendly target's maximum health by $E1min for 5 min.

62.name: Desperate Prayer
62.description: Instantly heals the caster for $E1min% of their health, and restores $E2min% of their mana.

63.name: Dispel Magic
63.description: Removes a Magic debuff from a friendly target, or buff from an enemy target.

64.name: Dark Resolve
64.description: Protects an ally against Fear, making them immune to the next effect. Lasts for $DUR.
64.aura_description: Immune to the next Fear effect.

65.name: Spark of Light
65.description: Heals a friendly target for $E1min for $E1max.

66.name: Greater Heal
66.description: Heals a friendly target for $E1min to $E1max.

67.name: Harrowing Strike
67.description: Deals $E1min% weapon damage as Shadow damage and reducing their damage by $E2D3% for $DUR.

68.name: Heal
68.description: Heals a friendly target for $E1min to $E1max.

69.name: Holy Bolt
69.description: Deals $E1min-$E1max Holy damage to an enemy and incapacitating them for $DUR. Breaks on damage.

70.name: Inner Strength
70.description: Increases a friendly target's damage by $E1min% for $DUR.

71.name: Lesser Heal
71.description: Heals a friendly target for $E1min to $E1max.

72.name: Penance
72.description: Punish an enemy target for their sins, burning $E1min points of their Mana in the process.

73.name: Discipline
73.description: Reduces all damage taken by a friendly target by $E1min% for 8 sec.

75.name: Satanic Madness
75.description: Horrify up to five nearby enemies with visions of Hell, causing them to flee in terror for $DUR. Effects breaks on direct damage.

76.name: Reincarnation
76.description: Grants a blessing to a friendly target that lasts for 5 minutes. If the target dies while the blessing is in effect, they are resurrected. Cannot be cast while in combat.
76.aura_description: If you respawn while this is active, you resurrect where you died.

77.name: Rejuvenation
77.description: Heals a friendly target for $E1max damage over $DUR.

78.name: Resurrection
78.description: Brings a dead player back to life with 50% health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

79.name: Plague
79.description: An instrument of darkness that causes $E1min Shadow damage every $INVL for $DUR.

80.name: Smite
80.description: Consumes an enemy target in Holy flames, dealing $E3min% weapon damage as Holy damage, plus an additional $E1min-$E1max Holy damage that stuns the target for $DUR.

82.name: Ranged Attack
82.description: Fires your ranged weapon at the enemy.

89.name: Minor Life Potion
89.description: Recovers the target's health by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

90.name: Lesser Life Potion
90.description: Recovers the target's health by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

91.name: Life Potion
91.description: Recovers the target's health by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

95.name: Minor Mana Potion
95.description: Recovers the target's mana by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

96.name: Lesser Mana Potion
96.description: Recovers the target's mana by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

97.name: Mana Potion
97.description: Recovers the target's mana by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

104.name: Greater Life Potion
104.description: Recovers the target's health by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

105.name: Major Life Potion
105.description: Recovers the target's health by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

108.name: Greater Mana Potion
108.description: Recovers the target's mana by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

109.name: Major Mana Potion
109.description: Recovers the target's mana by $E1D2 points every $INVL for $DUR.

129.name: Minor Accessory Orb
129.description: Attempt to empower an equippable item, adding additional armor or damage in addition to raising its Item Level by one. Failure will instead consume one point of empowerment.

130.name: Lesser Accessory Orb
130.description: Attempt to empower an equippable item, adding additional armor or damage in addition to raising its Item Level by one. Failure will instead consume one point of empowerment.

141.name: Throw Weapon
141.description: Fires your ranged weapon at the enemy.

143.name: Venomous Bite
143.description: Deals 85% Melee damage and poisons the target.
143.aura_description: Poisoned, inflicting damage over time. Effect can stack up to 5 times on a single target.

145.name: Cursed Poison
145.aura_description: Slowly burns mana and deals minor Shadow damage.

146.name: Learn: Wings of Freedom
146.description: Teaches you how to cast the spell 'Wings of Freedom', adding it to your list of abilities.

236.name: Determination
